metadata.description: Optional. New Relic License Key (modern ingest key). Provide either this or newRelicInsertKey; one of the two is required.
Optional. Legacy New Relic Insert Key (for older accounts). Provide either this or newRelicLicenseKey; one of the two is required.

Optional. Name of the existing storage account where VNet Flow Logs PT1H.json files are stored. Must be in the same resource group as this deployment. Leave this blank to create a new storage account (its name will start with 'nrvnetflsrc').
Optional. Region where all resources included in this template will be deployed. Leave this blank to use the same region as the one of the resource group.

Optional. The Logs API endpoint used to send your logs to. By default, it is https://log-api.newrelic.com/log/v1 if your account is in the United States (US) region. Otherwise, if you're in the European Union (EU) region, you should use https://log-api.eu.newrelic.com/log/v1, or if you're in the Japan (JP) region, you should use https://log-api.jp.nr-data.net/log/v1.
Optional. Custom tags to add to logs sent to New Relic (semicolon-separated key:value pairs, e.g. env:prod;team:network).
Optional. Maximum number of retries when sending logs to New Relic.
Optional. Retry interval in milliseconds when sending logs to New Relic.
Optional. Default log level for the Function App host. Maps to host.json logging.logLevel.default via the AzureFunctionsJobHost__logging__logLevel__default app setting.
Optional. Number of hours to retain blob-cursor records before the cleanup job removes them.
Optional. NCRONTAB schedule for the cursor cleanup timer trigger (default: daily at 03:00 UTC).
Optional. Number of consecutive failures per blob before the forwarder skips it as a poison event.
Optional. Maximum number of Flex Consumption instances the function app can scale to. Range: 1 to 1000.
Optional. Memory allocated per Flex Consumption instance, in MB. Allowed values: 512, 2048, 4096.

Optional. Event Hub scaling profile. 'Basic' uses 1 throughput unit with 4 partitions and no auto-inflate (suitable for low-to-medium traffic). 'Enterprise' enables auto-inflate up to 40 throughput units with 32 partitions (recommended for high-throughput / large-scale flow-log volumes). Note: partition count is fixed at Event Hub creation time and cannot be changed by a subsequent deployment.

Optional. When enabled, the function storage account, the function app, and the Event Hub are isolated within a private Virtual Network with private endpoints; public network access to them is disabled. The source storage account (containing VNet Flow Logs) is not modified and is expected to have public network access enabled.

resources.comments: Fails the deployment at parameter-validation time when neither newRelicLicenseKey nor newRelicInsertKey is provided. The inner template declares a required parameter that the outer template never passes, so ARM rejects the inner deployment.
resources.name: ERROR-Provide-either-newRelicLicenseKey-or-newRelicInsertKey

properties.scriptContent:
set -euo pipefail

echo 'Downloading package...'
python3 -c "import os, urllib.request; urllib.request.urlretrieve(os.environ['ZIP_URL'], '/tmp/package.zip')"
ls -la /tmp/package.zip

echo 'Deploying via az functionapp deployment source config-zip...'
az functionapp deployment source config-zip \
  --resource-group "$RESOURCE_GROUP" \
  --name "$FUNCTION_APP" \
  --src /tmp/package.zip \
  --build-remote false \
  --timeout 300
